title: galium hilendiae subsp. kingstonense
intro: Galium hilendiae subsp. kingstonense is a subspecies of the Galium hilendiae plant, belonging to the family Rubiaceae, and is native to Jamaica. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating gastrointestinal issues and as an antimicrobial agent, due to its bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Galium hilendiae subsp. kingstonense include its potential to alleviate digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made through infusion or decoction, with the leaves and stems being used in traditional medicine.
